task: put the pink object inside the right cabinet
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A white cabinet with an open right door is visible. Inside the cabinet, there is a white tray with a red object (pink object) on it. The cabinet door is open, providing access to the interior. The red object is on a flat surface (the tray). STRATEGY - First, reach into the cabinet to grasp the pink object. Then, transport it out of the cabinet and place it on the countertop. Failure modes include not grasping the object, dropping it during transport, or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach into the cabinet to grasp the pink object. The object is on a tray, so the tray's surface is the affordance region. Step 2: Grasp the pink object. The object is on the tray, so the tray's surface is the affordance region. Step 3: Transport the pink object out of the cabinet. The destination is the countertop, so the countertop's surface is the affordance region. Step 4: Place the pink object on the countertop. The countertop's surface is the affordance region.

Goal: on(pink_object, countertop)
Scene: pink_object, cabinet, tray, countertop
Step 1: reach(cabinet)
  affordance_region: the interior of the cabinet
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: inside(gripper, cabinet) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: inside(gripper, cabinet)
Step 2: grasp(pink_object)
  affordance_region: the surface of the tray
  contact: holding(pink_object) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pink_object)
Step 3: transport(pink_object -> countertop)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the countertop
  spatial: above(pink_object, countertop, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pink_object)
  done_when: above(pink_object, countertop, 0.05)
Step 4: place(pink_object -> countertop)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the countertop
  contact: surface_contact(pink_object, countertop) [completion]; released(pink_object) [completion]
  pose: stable(pink_object) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pink_object, countertop) AND released(pink_object)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: an empty area on the countertop
an empty area on the countertop
